item.title: LITE Shares Garner Attention After Hitting All-Time High, Price Target Update
item.description: Mizuho raised its price target on Lumentum to $645 from $525 and kept an ‘Outperform’ rating on the shares.

item.title: Trump Says $550 Billion Trade Deal With Japan Launched, Adds Tariffs Made It Possible
item.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said Japan had begun its first round of investments in the U.S. across projects in oil and gas development in Texas, ...

item.title: KRYS Stock Rallies On Upbeat Earnings: Jefferies Ups Price Target On Sustained Vyjuvek Optimism
item.description: Jefferies’ new price target represents a potential upside of about 34% from the stock’s closing price on Friday.

item.title: Ondas Holdings’ Stock Is Rallying Again Today – What’s The Reason Behind It
item.description: Ondas said that its subsidiary Sentrycs has successfully delivered and deployed its C-UAS solutions to a German State Police office.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxis Reportedly Involved In 14 Crash Incidents Since Launch
item.description: Electrek reported on Tuesday, citing data from U.S. auto safety regulator National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, that Tesla submitted five ne...
